flags.description: Master queue kill switch. Off — all reindex / sync-job dispatches short-circuit to SEARCH_QUEUE_DISABLED with 503. Emergency ops during engine incidents.
IndexModelJob dispatch from HasSearchable observers. Off — model saves stop pushing to engines; search index goes stale until manual reindex. Existing queries keep working (stale results).
RecordSearchAnalyticsEventJob execution. Off — no analytics rows written; dashboards empty. Used during analytics-storm incidents.
GET /api/v1/search/analytics/* endpoints. Off — dashboards return 503. Rare — for perf incidents on the aggregation.
GET /api/v1/search/suggest. Off — autocomplete returns 503. Used to shed load during a Meilisearch incident.
WarmSynonymCacheJob execution. Off — engine synonym state goes stale until manual re-warm.
SendSearchSyncNotificationJob execution. Off — sync jobs complete silently; users poll `GET /sync-jobs/{id}`.
PruneSearchAnalyticsJob execution. Off — nothing purges. Emergency during retention policy audits.
The 15-min + login-time stalled sweep. Off — stuck sync jobs sit until daily prune.
7-day query text scrub pass in PruneSearchAnalyticsJob. Off — raw query text retained for full row TTL. DANGEROUS — GDPR guardrail. Only disable with legal sign-off.

HasActivityLog on SearchIndex / SearchSyncJob / SearchSynonym / SearchSavedQuery dual-write to activity_log. Off decouples search transitions from the workspace feed. Emergency during activity ingest storms.
HasAudit on SearchIndex + SearchSyncJob dual-write to audits. Off decouples from the audit trail. Very rare — only when the audit substrate is quarantined.
Use the compiled SearchIndex registry cache. Off — registry is scanned from reflection on every boot (slow; for registry debugging).

SwapIndexAliasJob execution. Off — successful reindexes complete but the alias never swaps; old index stays live. Reversible via re-enable + manual `search:reindex --swap-only`. Used to freeze traffic on the old index during a migration window.
